mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM dynamic_comments WHERE dynamic_id = #{dynamicId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 0
ORDER BY like_count DESC, created_at DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT * FROM dynamic_comments WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dynamic_comments WHERE dynamic_id = #{dynamicId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND status = 0
